results.title: Violin modes & tone quality — The Strad
results.judge_reason: Discusses violin free-plate eigenmodes and tap-tone analysis related to luthier grading, but focuses on mode 2/mode 5 frequencies rather than the tap-test ringing-decay criteria described in the candidate.

results.title: Modal Analysis — Schleske Master Studio
results.judge_reason: Covers impulse-hammer tap modal analysis correlating eigenmodes with sound quality - adjacent to luthier grading but emphasizes laser vibrometry rather than the ringing-decay tap-test grading workflow.

results.title: Tap Tones and Weights of Old Italian Violin Tops
kw_matches: luthier grading (implicit via Old Italian violin tops)
results.judge_reason: Direct match for source-side tap-tone measurements on Cremonese violin tops, closely aligned with the luthier tap-test tonewood grading mechanism in the candidate.

results.title: MathBode: Frequency-Response Stability of LLM Reasoning (2025/9)
results.judge_reason: Direct match for the LLM-side mechanism - sinusoidal probing of LLM reasoning with first-harmonic gain/phase and low-pass behavior is essentially the candidate's proposed mechanism, though framed as stability rather than pre-fine-tune screening.

results.title: Calibrated Speculative Decoding: Frequency-Guided Candidate Selection (2026/4)
results.judge_reason: Frequency-guided speculative decoding is a different mechanism (token candidate selection during decoding, not frequency-response model evaluation for pre-fine-tune screening).

results.title: Bode plot — Wikipedia
results.judge_reason: Generic signal-processing Bode plot reference - relevant background concept for frequency-response evaluation but not specific to LLMs, model selection, or luthiery.

results.title: LLM-Based Audio Equalizers (2026/1)
results.judge_reason: LLM mapping natural-language prompts to EQ settings is an entirely different application (audio control) and shares no mechanism with frequency-response model screening.

results.title: Acoustic Prompt Tuning (2023/12)
results.judge_reason: Audio-embedding injection into LLMs has no functional overlap with frequency-response model evaluation or tap-test tonewood grading.
